player_notes.jalen williams: Day-to-day with a left hamstring injury after exiting Game 2; status is game-to-game. If he misses or is limited, significant usage shifts to SGA and other Thunder wings — fade Williams props until cleared.
player_notes.de'aaron fox: Out again for Game 3 with a right high ankle sprain (missed Game 2 as well). Avoid all Fox props; his absence elevates usage for other Spurs guards.
player_notes.dylan harper: Suffered a right hamstring injury in Game 2 and is set for an MRI. Status highly uncertain — avoid Harper props until MRI results known.
player_notes.shai gilgeous-alexander: Scored 30 in Game 2 with full usage; no injury concerns noted. Elevated role further if Jalen Williams misses Game 3 — positive lean on SGA scoring/assists props.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: Spurs are without De'Aaron Fox (ankle) and Dylan Harper (hamstring/MRI pending), severely thinning their guard rotation. Thunder's Jalen Williams is day-to-day with a hamstring injury — his absence would further concentrate OKC's offense through SGA.
